task.title: UX Gremlin enhanced report generation
task.goal: Implement optional structured results input and synchronized Markdown, JSON, and static HTML report outputs for ux-gremlin.
task.scope: Only the ux-gremlin plugin report-generation path, related structured artifacts, docs, version metadata, and tests.
non_goals: Do not parse Playwright reporter JSON.

assumptions.statement: The current report command is implemented in the ux-gremlin skill script and writes a single Markdown report from plan data.
evidence: plugins/ux-gremlin/skills/ux-gremlin/scripts/ux-gremlin.mjs defines commandReport(planPath), outputReportPath, and fs.writeFileSync(outputReportPath, content, "utf-8").
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: The implementation could modify the wrong report path or duplicate existing behavior.
assumptions.decision: Extend the existing commandReport path instead of adding a parallel command.

assumptions.statement: The plugin currently uses only Node built-in modules for the CLI, so enhanced report generation can avoid new runtime dependencies.
evidence: ux-gremlin.mjs imports node:fs, node:path, and node:url only.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Adding schema or HTML support might require a dependency and broaden scope.
assumptions.decision: Reuse the existing conservative YAML parser and implement validation helpers locally.

assumptions.statement: The existing ux-gremlin test suite is passing before changes.
evidence: npm test in plugins/ux-gremlin passed 3 tests before implementation.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: A pre-existing failure could be misattributed to this change.
assumptions.decision: Use the current passing tests as the baseline and add targeted tests for the new behavior.

assumptions.statement: A non-breaking minor version bump is appropriate because existing commands and plan schema remain compatible while adding optional report features.
assumptions.verification_method: Compare requested public interface with current command usage and package metadata.
evidence: The requested plan explicitly preserves the existing report command and adds optional --results and --out-dir.
Current package and Codex manifest versions are 1.0.0.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Incorrect versioning could misrepresent a breaking or patch-level change.
assumptions.decision: Bump package and Codex plugin manifest versions to 1.1.0 and add a changelog entry.

final_verification.notes: UX Gremlin plugin tests, plan validation, and marketplace check passed after implementation.
